prompt: Create a highly realistic vertical smartphone-style courtside portrait of a young woman at a Chicago Bulls NBA game, framed from about mid-thigh/waist up, standing or seated near the lower bowl seats and facing the camera. She wears an oversized bright red Chicago Bulls hoodie with large varsity-style “BULLS” lettering across the chest and the Bulls logo below, loose sleeves, front pouch pocket, and hoodie drawstrings. Her dark brown layered messy wolf cut with loose waves falls around her shoulders, with natural volume and slightly tousled texture. Her face is intentionally anonymized by a centered plain rectangular blur/block in a warm skin-tone color covering the facial features. She holds one clear plastic cup of amber beer or iced drink in her left hand near chest height; the cup has a black-and-red Chicago Bulls bull logo printed on it, condensation and realistic plastic reflections. Use a relaxed casual fan pose, one hand holding the drink and the other tucked into the hoodie pocket. The background is a packed basketball arena with visible rows of spectators, detailed seating tiers, red LED ribbon boards reading “BULLS” with Bulls logos, the basketball court and hoop visible on the right, a shot clock showing 24, and players/staff in the distance. Keep the stadium background detailed and recognizable rather than blurred, with indoor arena lighting, realistic crowd density, natural phone-camera perspective, sharp fabric texture, glossy drink reflections, and authentic courtside atmosphere. No extra text beyond visible arena signage and Bulls branding.
